feature.name: CSV transform pipeline
feature.description: Extract the VibeShop CSV ingest pipeline (normalize, filter, dedupe, optional aggregate) as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: parse CSV text into row dicts
normalize headers and coerce quantity/unit_price fields
drop invalid rows and enforce minimum quantity
dedupe rows by sku keeping last occurrence
optionally aggregate rows by a grouping key
sort stable output when not aggregating
excluded_behaviors: CSV writer serialization helpers for responses
original project tests and CLI entrypoints

entanglement.description: CSV processing is split across reader, mapper, cleaner, and transform stages with duplicate string helpers and pipeline side effects on GLOBAL_STATE.
signals: pipeline orchestrates four transform modules with implicit ordering
header normalization duplicated in helpers and mapper paths
transform records last job metadata in GLOBAL_STATE

output.signature: transform_csv(csv_text: str, *, options: TransformOptions | None = None) -> list[dict]
